title: Official action of boards; vote required
doc_html:
§3356.  Official action of boards; vote required

Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, all official actions of each board shall require the favorable vote of nine members.

Added by Acts 1975, No. 313, §2, eff. July 17, 1975.

§3356.  Official action of boards; vote required
Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, all official actions of each board shall require the favorable vote of nine members.
Added by Acts 1975, No. 313, §2, eff. July 17, 1975.
